nuestra_agua.name: Los Ricos
nuestra_agua.subtitle: Pilot system and first learning site
nuestra_agua.notes: Pilot system at the Caminos de Agua Field Center. The first Nuestra Agua system implemented at community scale, serving 40 families.

nuestra_agua.name: Alonso Yáñez
nuestra_agua.subtitle: First large-scale community system in operation
key_advances: Public health study with INSP and Columbia University
nuestra_agua.notes: The largest Nuestra Agua system, designed to serve the entire community of ~300 families. Includes a domestic water distribution program. Site of an INSP/Columbia University fluoride health study (2024–2026).

nuestra_agua.name: San Elías
nuestra_agua.subtitle: Most recent system — launched January 2026
key_advances: Integrated into SAMA state monitoring program
nuestra_agua.current_challenges: Improve arsenic adsorption capacity and expand distribution to new communities.
nuestra_agua.notes: Went online January 2026. Builds on lessons from Alonso Yáñez — stronger governance, on-site disinfection, and integration into the state water monitoring program.
